page.title: Jet Ski Rental Marbella 2026: Sea-Doo Rides from €200/h

data.meta_description: Jet ski rental Marbella from €200 per hour. Sea-Doo personal watercraft from Puerto Banús — life jacket, briefing and fuel included. Solo or two-up. Book on WhatsApp in 60 seconds.
data.summary: Jet ski rental spoke covering Sea-Doo PWC hire in Marbella — pricing, what's included, where to depart from, what to expect, and the Mangusta 80 charter that includes a jet ski free.
key_facts: Jet ski rental in Marbella: €200 per hour on Sea-Doo personal watercraft
Departs Puerto Banús — life jacket, briefing, fuel and insurance included
Solo rider or two-up — same hourly rate, no upcharge for a passenger
On-the-dock safety briefing and licensing handled — no Spanish licence required
Combo deal: book the Mangusta 80 yacht charter and the jet ski is free for the day

faq.q: How much is a jet ski rental in Marbella?
faq.a: €200 for one hour on a Sea-Doo personal watercraft, including fuel for normal use, life jacket, on-the-dock briefing and insurance. Two-up (rider plus passenger) costs the same as solo. Longer durations are quoted on WhatsApp and bring the per-hour rate down.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to ride a jet ski in Spain?
faq.a: For our rentals you do not need to bring a Spanish licence — we operate the jet skis under our commercial permit and provide the briefing and supervision required by Spanish maritime authorities. You'll need ID (passport or EU card), be 18 or older, and complete a 10-minute on-the-dock briefing covering throttle, kill switch, anchor lines and the 200 m swim-zone rule.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski leave from?
faq.a: Puerto Banús marina — the same pontoon as our yacht fleet. Arrive 15 minutes before your slot for the safety briefing. Underground parking is 5 minutes from the dock. We will send the exact meeting point 24 hours before your booking.

Yes — every Sea-Doo we operate is rated for two riders. No extra cost for a passenger. Both rider and passenger get life jackets and are covered by the rental insurance. Children must be at least 8 years old and tall enough to brace against the seat.

faq.q: What's included with the Mangusta 80 charter?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 superyacht charter (€4,719 for 4 hours) includes a Sea-Doo jet ski free for the entire day. The jet ski lives on the swim platform and you can use it during any anchor stop. See the Mangusta 80 page for the full details.

data.body_html:
Jet ski rental in Marbella starts at €200 for a one-hour ride on a Sea-Doo personal watercraft, departing Puerto Banús. Life jacket, on-the-dock briefing, fuel and insurance are all included. Same rate solo or two-up. If you'd rather have the jet ski waiting for you on the back of a yacht, the Mangusta 80 charter includes one free for the day.

Jet ski rental Marbella prices

DurationPrice (EUR)What's included
1 hour€200Sea-Doo PWC, life jacket, briefing, fuel, insurance
2 hours€380Same — slightly better per-hour rate
Half day (4 h)€700Range to Estepona or east to Cabopino
Yacht + jet ski comboFrom €4,719Free jet ski with the Mangusta 80 charter

All prices include licensed supervision, fuel for normal coastal use, life jacket, dry bag, briefing and Spanish IVA (VAT 21%).

What you can do on the water

The Marbella coast is the perfect playground for a one-hour Sea-Doo session. The 200 m coastal swim-zone rule applies, but outside it you have miles of open water along the Golden Mile and east towards Cabopino. Typical 1-hour itineraries:

  • Puerto Banús → Río Verde → back — quick tour past the marquee beach clubs (Nikki Beach, Ocean Club).
  • Puerto Banús → Marbella Marina → back — see the Golden Mile from the water, including Marbella Club and Puente Romano.
  • Combine with a yacht anchor stop — if you've booked a charter, anchor off Río Verde and let guests take turns on the jet ski for 10 minutes each.

The Sea-Doo experience

Modern Sea-Doo PWC are easy to ride — twist-grip throttle, lanyard kill switch, intuitive handlebars. The 10-minute on-the-dock briefing covers everything you need to know. You will:

  1. Throttle and brake. Right thumb forward to go, release to coast. Sea-Doos have an iBR brake-and-reverse system that makes docking much easier than older jet skis.
  2. Kill switch lanyard. Clipped to your life jacket. If you fall off, the engine stops automatically.
  3. The 200 m rule. Stay outside the swim-buoy line along every Marbella beach. Penalties are stiff and the Guardia Civil del Mar patrol.
  4. Wake awareness. Slow inside the Puerto Banús harbour mouth and when passing other boats — keep your wake low.

After the briefing you take the Sea-Doo out for a controlled lap of the marina with our staff watching, and from there you're on your own.

What's included on every jet ski rental

  • Sea-Doo personal watercraft for the duration
  • Life jacket (rider + passenger)
  • On-the-dock briefing — 10 minutes, plus a controlled lap of the marina
  • Fuel for normal coastal use (about €15 of petrol per hour)
  • Insurance — third-party + damage cover, deductible held against credit card pre-authorisation
  • Spanish IVA (VAT, 21%)
  • Dry bag for your phone and keys

Not included: GoPro / camera rental (bring your own, we can mount it), professional photographer (€200 for an hour-long shoot on a chase boat — ask when you book), and gratuity for the briefing crew.

Booking and meeting point

WhatsApp us with your date, group size, preferred time slot and whether you want one or two Sea-Doos. We confirm availability within minutes and hold the slot for 24 hours with no deposit. Pier and slot number sent 24 hours before. Arrive 15 minutes early for the briefing, ID in hand (passport or EU card). Underground parking at Puerto Banús is €2/hour, 5 minutes walk to the pontoon.

Combine with a yacht charter

Two ways to get jet ski + yacht in the same day:

Option A — Mangusta 80 charter with jet ski included free: the 24 m Mangusta 80 carries a Sea-Doo on its swim platform. The jet ski is free for guests to use throughout the day. Anchor off Río Verde, ride the Sea-Doo for 20 minutes, back to the yacht for cava. From €4,719 for 4 hours. See Mangusta 80.

Option B — Add a jet ski to any yacht booking: book the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 for the day, plus a one-hour Sea-Doo session before or after. €200 add-on, same Puerto Banús meeting point.

Frequently asked questions

How much is a jet ski rental in Marbella?

€200 for one hour on a Sea-Doo personal watercraft, including fuel for normal use, life jacket, on-the-dock briefing and insurance. Two-up (rider plus passenger) costs the same as solo.

Do I need a licence to ride a jet ski in Spain?

For our rentals you do not need to bring a Spanish licence — we operate under our commercial permit and provide the briefing required by Spanish maritime authorities. You'll need ID, be 18 or older, and complete a 10-minute on-the-dock briefing.

Where does the jet ski leave from?

Puerto Banús marina — the same pontoon as our yacht fleet. Arrive 15 minutes before your slot for the safety briefing.

Can I take a passenger?

Yes — every Sea-Doo we operate is rated for two riders. No extra cost for a passenger. Both rider and passenger get life jackets and are covered by the rental insurance.

What's included with the Mangusta 80 charter?

The Mangusta 80 superyacht charter (€4,719 for 4 hours) includes a Sea-Doo jet ski free for the entire day. The jet ski lives on the swim platform and you can use it during any anchor stop.
